C:\Users\djhbi\AppData\Local\Temp\codex-opencv-sift-build\emsdk-main\upstream\emscripten\em++.bat -s WASM=1 -s SINGLE_FILE=1 -s USE_PTHREADS=0 -s SINGLE_FILE=1 -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS="['_malloc', '_free']"   -fsigned-char -W -Wall -Wreturn-type -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Waddress -Wsequence-point -Wformat -Wformat-security -Wmissing-declarations -Wmissing-prototypes -Wstrict-prototypes -Wundef -Winit-self -Wpointer-arith -Wshadow -Wsign-promo -Wuninitialized -Winconsistent-missing-override -Wno-delete-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-unnamed-type-template-args -Wno-comment -Wno-deprecated-enum-enum-conversion -Wno-deprecated-anon-enum-enum-conversion -fdiagnostics-show-option -Qunused-arguments -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections  -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -O3 -DNDEBUG  -DNDEBUG   -Wl,--gc-sections  -s TOTAL_MEMORY=128MB -s WASM_MEM_MAX=1GB -s ALLOW_MEMORY_GROWTH=1 -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_NAME="'cv'" -s FORCE_FILESYSTEM=1 --use-preload-plugins --bind --post-js C:/Users/djhbi/AppData/Local/Temp/codex-opencv-sift-build/opencv-4.x/modules/js/src/helpers.js  -Wno-missing-prototypes @CMakeFiles\opencv_js.dir\objects1.rsp -o ..\..\bin\opencv_js.js @CMakeFiles\opencv_js.dir\linkLibs.rsp
